# ANVIL — Design & Fabrication

> Anvil Design & Fabrication is a Cambridgeshire (UK) steel fabrication workshop. We design and handcraft homeware, functional objects, gates, railings and bespoke commissions in steel and wood — each piece conceived, cut and finished in the same workshop.

Based in Great Gransden, Sandy, SG19 3BJ. Monday–Friday, 9am–5pm.
Enquiries: lewisbond@anvilfabrication.com · +44 7921 382430

## Pages

- [Home](https://anvilfabrication.com/): Studio overview and featured work — homeware and functional objects in steel and wood.
- [Homeware portfolio](https://anvilfabrication.com/portfolio/homeware): Steel homeware — tables, desks, storage, accessories, decor, garden pieces.
- [Objects portfolio](https://anvilfabrication.com/portfolio/objects): Functional steel objects — gates, railings, barriers, and commercial fabrications.
- [Contact](https://anvilfabrication.com/contact): Workshop enquiries and commissions. Bring a sketch, photograph, or just an idea.

## What we make

- **Homeware**: Handcrafted steel and oak home office desks, dining tables, storage, shelving, lighting, garden ornaments.
- **Objects**: Bespoke steel garden gates, access gates, residential and commercial railings, handrails, fences, workbenches, stair banisters, commercial storage.
- **Commissions**: Made-to-measure. No standard options, no minimum orders.

## Materials and approach

Mild steel, galvanised steel, flat bar, round bar, box section, sheet steel, and UK-sourced oak. Each piece is hand-welded and finished on site.
